name: Mamadara Uchiha (Shippuden)
description:
The 4th Ninja War is getting close of the climax, Tobi revelead his true identity of Obito, but the biggest plot twist is the real Madara appearing, but Kabuto messed up the hand seals during the revival, reviving Madara like a woman. While everyone is occupied with Obito, guess who has to endure the Madara MILF?

Credits for the art: Tenchi Zone, Qjqjqjql, Uri Ryou and Kooiko. (1 bot remaining and is the supreme GILF, Kaguya.)
